violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. Multiple food boxes/bags in walk in freezers open. Close boxes/bags to protect food items.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Bucket sanitizer concentration low for FOH wiping cloths. See Table. Recommend 200 ppm chlorine.
Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling * were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Textured ceilings in kitchen. Textured ceilings in kitchen areas have soot build up around HVAC vents and need to be cleaned.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. Multiple items in grab-n-go cooler not maintained below 41 degrees F.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors need cleaning under shelving units in walk in cooler/freezer. Textured ceiling near fryers needs cleaning. Not a smooth and easily cleanable surface.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
